content: Plan landing sections: Nav, Hero (typewriter + product preview), Stats, Features, How-it-works, Product showcase, Testimonials, Pricing, FAQ, Final CTA, Footer

Restructure App.js routes: / → Landing, /app → StudyAssistant, /login → Login
Verify with esbuild + screenshot (desktop + mobile full-scroll)
